title: Powersaving does not work on Xiao ESP32S3

messages.author: Bogdan_z_lasu
messages.text: Hi, i tested the powersaving feature on the xiao, it does not work, tried release 1.11 and nightly. But it does work with the powersaving 11.2.3 version. Any ideas what goes wrong with the merge?
messages.content_html: Hi, i tested the powersaving feature on the xiao, it does not work, tried release 1.11 and nightly. But it does work with the powersaving 11.2.3 version. Any ideas what goes wrong with the merge?

messages.author: Bogdan_z_lasu
messages.text: answering to myself, the xiao esp32s3+wio does not support powersaving in the current release, there is work in progress to have this device a powersaving rpt. i compiled a working version for test.
messages.content_html: answering to myself, the xiao esp32s3+wio does not support powersaving in the current release, there is work in progress to have this device a powersaving rpt. i compiled a working version for test.
messages.reactions_html: 1
